title: Intranuclear CITE-seq (inCITE-seq): joint single-cell measurements of multiplexed nuclear proteins and RNA

steps: Transfer 1 mL of nuclei suspension from the filter tube into a pre-chilled 15mL Falcon tube.
Resuspend pellet in 500 µL of Blocking Buffer. Pipette up and down multiple times using a P200 pipette to ensure the sample is mixed thoroughly.
Incubate for 00:10:00 at 4 °C while rocking.
Remove frozen tissue sample from -80 °C storage and place on dry ice until ready.

Resuspend pellet in 100 µL of pre-chilled RSB Buffer (ensure that there is no Tween-20 in this solution!) using a P200 pipette. Mix carefully and thoroughly. Add 200 µL more of RSB using a P1000 pipette. Mix carefully and thoroughly. Total volume should be 300 µL .

Add 1 mL of FA-NT solution using a P1000 pipette, mixing the first 1 mL carefully and thoroughly with the nuclei suspension. Add 2 mL more of FA-NT solution. The total volume in the tube should be 4 mL .
Immediately spike 3 µL of glacial acetic acid to nuclei suspension.
Dounce with pestle "A" until resistance subsides (~40 strokes) On ice .
Pre-chill all Douncers and pestle
Place sample into a clean, pre-chilled mortar filled with 2 mL of EZ Lysis Buffer.
Place pestle "A" in 50mL Falcon tube to hold until ready for cleaning.
Douce with pestle "B" until resistance subsides (~40 strokes) On ice .
Place pestle "B" in 50mL Falcon tube to hold until ready for cleaning.
Transfer the 2 mL homogenate to a pre-chilled 15mL Falcon Tube.
Add 3 mL of EZ Lysis Buffer to raise the sample volume to 5 mL total -- volumes can be added to wash out the mortar before being added, to maximize nuclei transfer.
Incubate for 00:05:00 On ice .

During this incubation, spray mortars and pestles with 10% bleach, let sit, and rinse with distilled water in order to clean off remaining tissue. After rinsing, soak mortars and pestles in 10% bleach and store until next use.
Spin down nuclei at 500 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes in pre-cooled swinging bucket centrifuge.
Carefully remove and discard supernatent.
Resuspend pellet in 1 mL of EZ Lysis Buffer using a P1000 pipette. Mix carefully and thoroughly. Add another 4 mL of EZ Lysis Buffer. Mix carefully and thoroughly. The total volume should be 5 mL .
Incubate for 00:05:00 On ice .
Spin down nuclei at 500 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes in pre-cooled swinging bucket centrifuge.
Filter through a 20 µm filter into a pre-chilled FACS tube.
Carefully remove and discard supernatent.
Resuspend pellet in 1 mL of RSB Buffer.
Filter 1 mL of nuclei suspension through a pre-chilled 35 µm filter cap FACS tubes.
Immediately after, quench the fixation reaction by adding 3 µL of 1 M Glycine. Use P1000 pipette to mix sample thoroughly to ensure equal distribution of glycine throughout solution.
Filter through a 20 µm filter into new, pre-chilled 15mL Falcon Tube.
Spin down nuclei at 850 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes .
Remove and discard supernatent.
Incubate for 00:15:00 at 4 °C while rocking.
Spin down nuclei at 850 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes .
Remove and discard supernatent.
Resuspend pellet in 200 µL of primary antibody diluted to the appropriate concentration in Blocking Buffer.
Incubate for 01:00:00 at 4 °C while rocking.
Spin down nuclei at 850 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes .
Carefully remove and discard supernatent.
Resuspend pellet in 500 µL of PBST.
Incubate 00:05:00 On ice .
Spin down nuclei at 850 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes .
Repeat wash steps 34-37 to to ensure removal of any excess antibodies.
Resuspend pellet in 200 µL of secondary antibody diluted 1:1000 in Blocking Buffer.
Remove and discard supernatent. If preforming a secondary antibody stain, proceed to step 42. If loading onto 10x, proceed to step 50.
Incubate for 00:20:00 at 4 °C while rocking.
After incubation, spike in 2 µL of 100x DAPI into each sample. Mix carefully and thoroughly using a P200 pipette.
Repeat wash steps 34-37 two times to ensure removal of any excess antibodies in solution.
Spin down nuclei at 850 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes .
Resuspend pellet in 500 µL of PBST.
filter through a 20 20 µm filter into a pre-chilled FACS tube.
Keep samples in dark On ice until processing via flow cytometry.
Count nuclei using hemocytometer chamber. Keep nuclei On ice until ready for 10X loading.
All steps should be performed On ice or at 4 °C . Cool a swinging bucket centrifuge to 4 °C . Prepare all reagents and chill On ice .

Clean one set of douncers (mortar, pestle A and pestle B) for every sample as follows. Make sure to thoroughly wash inside the mortar and at the end of each pestle where the sample will come in contact: Rinse with distilled water. Spray with 70% ethanol. Let sit for ~ 00:01:00 Rinse with distilled water Spray with RNase Zap. Let sit for 00:01:00 Rinse with distilled water Rinse with DNase and RNase free double distilled water Let air dry on kimewipe Once dry, pre-chill on On ice .
Pre-chill all tubes On ice . For each sample, you will need: 3 x 15mL Falcon Tubes 1 x 1.5mL Eppendorf tube 2 x 35µm filter-cap FACS tubes 2 x 20µm filters
